steps.name: Select 'A transaction flow' company using filter
Select 'The merchant' business unit using filter
Verify: transaction status in the table

Get cell for column 'Status' in transaction id.transaction.exzTNACbz7r0KKQXCFENDKSE5cKRD4Ezz5pSvl_ARJpB7Wu1bSRI1VCqL52e4DZ7Ec6IXcDLz7rUknSFFPTCfc3JY5k5_9mhJ2q0oPjAS-QL3OqIA3fePEI0IFPep35JIK-yuL5SKeQYp5ciEFbkzw
